_comment: QR placement per layout key (SHAPE_SIZE). qr_box is FRACTIONAL (fx,fy of width/height; fsize = side as fraction of width) so it is resolution-independent and identical for A5/A6 of a shape. MEASURED from the empty QR window in the blank templates and cross-checked against the finished sample PDFs (D02 window centre matched the printed QR centre exactly). page_*_pt are the template MediaBox sizes.

D02_A6._measured_px: 1539x1752; same design as D02_A5, smaller page

D01_A6._measured_px: 1240x1748; same design as D01_A5, smaller page
